meta.name: Junteng Liu
meta.employer: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

items.title: LLM Reasoning and Reinforcement Learning
items.description: Developing reasoning capabilities in large language models, including synthesizing verifiable reasoning data at scale.

items.title: Hallucination in Vision-Language Models (VLMs)
items.description: Understanding and mitigating hallucination problems in multimodal models, especially for chart understanding.

items.title: LLM Truthfulness and Interpretability
items.description: Investigating the inner representations of LLMs that encode truthfulness, and using these to mitigate hallucinations.

items.title: Ph.D. in Computer Science
items.organization: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
items.description: Member of the HKUST NLP Group. Advisor: Prof. Junxian He.

items.title: SynLogic: Synthesizing Verifiable Reasoning Data at Scale for Learning Logical Reasoning and Beyond

items.title: On the Universal Truthfulness Hyperplane Inside LLMs
items.authors: Junteng Liu, Shiqi Chen, Yu Cheng, Junxian He

items.title: In-Context Sharpness as Alerts: An Inner Representation Perspective for Hallucination Mitigation
items.authors: Shiqi Chen, Miao Xiong, Junteng Liu, Zhengxuan Wu, Teng Xiao, Siyang Gao, Junxian He

items.title: C-Eval: A Multi-Level Multi-Discipline Chinese Evaluation Suite for Foundation Models

items.title: Composing Parameter-Efficient Modules with Arithmetic Operations
items.authors: Jinghan Zhang, Shiqi Chen, Junteng Liu, Junxian He

items.title: Research Areas
items.description: Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning, Large Language Models, Vision-Language Models, Reinforcement Learning, Model Interpretability

items.title: Research Skills
items.description: Empirical research, paper writing, conference submissions (EMNLP, ICML, NeurIPS), open-source code release

items.title: Tooling
items.description: Python, deep learning frameworks, NLP/ML libraries (standard for LLM training, fine-tuning, and evaluation)
